criteria.text: MoM values in the report: when month-to-date AND prior-month named ranges are configured, /api/reports includes numeric monthToDate and prevMonth per metric (and totalEncounters carries both as sums), alongside existing last/prior WoW fields

MoM delta in the Reports page: each metric shows a month-over-month change (monthToDate vs prevMonth, percent + direction) visually distinct from WoW and any YoY, color-blind-safe (icon/text not color alone)

Graceful absence / back-compat: a workbook with no month ranges omits the month fields; the page renders WoW (and YoY if present) exactly as before with no MoM column and no error; no breaking change to the DTO
Encounters-by-specialty MoM: each specialty row carries its month-over-month comparison consistent with the metric table
Aggregate-only, no PHI: response and logs carry only aggregate counts (no patient/customer identifiers); workbook read audits item reference + outcome only, never cell values (per MAD-26)
